title: SSC Multi Tasking Staff (MTS) 2025
age_limit: 18-25 years. Relaxation for SC/ST is 5 years.
qualification: 10th Class Pass from a recognized board.
instructions: Apply online at ssc.gov.in. Upload clear photo and signature.
selection_process: Computer Based Examination (CBE) and Physical Test (for specific posts).
job_description: Staff Selection Commission (SSC) has released a recruitment notification for Multi Tasking (Non-Technical) Staff and Havaldar (CBIC & CBN). This is a great opportunity for 10th pass candidates to enter central government services.

title: IBPS Clerk Recruitment 2025
qualification: Any Graduation Degree from a recognized University.
pattern_table:
Test|Marks|Time
English Language|30|20 Min
Numerical Ability|35|20 Min
Reasoning Ability|35|20 Min
instructions: Candidates must register on the IBPS official portal. Biometric data will be captured.
selection_process: Preliminary Online Examination and Main Online Examination.
job_description: Institute of Banking Personnel Selection (IBPS) invites applications for the recruitment of Clerks in participating banks across India. Candidates must be proficient in the local language of the state they apply for.

title: RRB Group D Technical Update
age_limit: 18-33 years. OBC relaxation 3 years, SC/ST 5 years.
qualification: 10th Pass or ITI from institutions recognized by NCVT/SCVT.
pattern_table:
Section|Marks
General Science|25
Mathematics|25
General Intelligence|30
General Awareness|20
instructions: Single stage CBT followed by PET. Selection is based purely on merit.
application_fee:
General: ₹500 (₹400 refunded after exam)
Reserved: ₹250 (Full refund after exam)
selection_process: Computer Based Test (CBT), Physical Efficiency Test (PET), and Document Verification.
job_description: Railway Recruitment Board (RRB) is hiring for various Level 1 posts (Group D). This mega recruitment drive aims to fill technical and maintenance positions in different railway zones.

title: UPSC Civil Services Prelims 2026
qualification: Graduate Degree in any discipline from a recognized University.
pattern_table:
Paper|Marks|Duration
General Studies I|200|2 Hours
General Studies II (CSAT)|200|2 Hours
instructions: The examination will be conducted in three stages. Preliminary, Mains, and Interview.
selection_process: Civil Services (Preliminary) Exam, Civil Services (Main) Exam, and Personality Test (Interview).
job_description: Union Public Service Commission (UPSC) has announced the Civil Services Examination 2026. This is India's premier examination for recruitment to administrative, police, and foreign services.

title: SBI PO Vacancy Notification
qualification: Graduation in any discipline. Final year students can also apply.
pattern_table:
Phase|Marks|Type
Phase I (Prelims)|100|Objective
Phase II (Mains)|250|Objective + Descriptive
instructions: Selection is via a three-phase process. Candidates must clear all phases for final selection.
selection_process: Phase-I: Preliminary Examination, Phase-II: Main Examination, Phase-III: Psychometric Test & Interview.
job_description: State Bank of India (SBI) is recruiting Probationary Officers (PO). SBI PO is one of the most sought-after jobs in the banking sector due to its high pay and career growth opportunities.
